# Test append and propose commands, plus commit tracking.
# Witness engagement is a separate explicit step.

# Set up two voters; v2 has a longer log.
add-voters
v1: [a1]
v2: [a1 b2]
----
v1: [a1] term=a cfg=(v1 v2 w)
v2: [a1 b2] term=b cfg=(v1 v2 w)

# v2 wins the election, gets a noop entry at term c.
campaign v2
----
v2 campaigns at term c
v2: yes (self)
v1: yes
w:  yes
outcome: won

# Propose a new entry. Only the leader has it, so committed stays 0.
propose v2
----
v1: [a1] term=c cfg=(v1 v2 w)
v2: [a1 b2 c3 c4] term=c cfg=(v1 v2 w) leader

# Replicate to v1. Now both voters have c4, so quorum is reached
# and committed advances.
append v2
----
v2 appends through c4
v1: ok
v1: [a1 b2 c3 c4] term=c cfg=(v1 v2 w)
v2: [a1 b2 c3 c4] term=c cfg=(v1 v2 w) committed=4 leader

# Propose another entry. Not yet replicated, so committed doesn't advance.
propose v2
----
v1: [a1 b2 c3 c4] term=c cfg=(v1 v2 w)
v2: [a1 b2 c3 c4 c5] term=c cfg=(v1 v2 w) committed=4 leader

# Append with v1 dropped. Only v2 has c5, no quorum without witness.
append v2 drop=(v1)
----
v2 appends through c5
v1: ok (dropped)
v1: [a1 b2 c3 c4] term=c cfg=(v1 v2 w)
v2: [a1 b2 c3 c4 c5] term=c cfg=(v1 v2 w) committed=4 leader

# Engage the witness. It now covers quorum for c5 (v2 + witness = 2/3).
engage v2
----
ok
vote:  (c, v2)
acked: (c5, engaged)

# Propose yet another entry. The witness is engaged, so v2 + witness
# is already quorum. Committed advances immediately.
propose v2
----
v1: [a1 b2 c3 c4] term=c cfg=(v1 v2 w)
v2: [a1 b2 c3 c4 c5 c6] term=c cfg=(v1 v2 w) committed=6 leader

# Replicate everything to v1 (witness still engaged).
append v2
----
v2 appends through c6
v1: ok
v1: [a1 b2 c3 c4 c5 c6] term=c cfg=(v1 v2 w)
v2: [a1 b2 c3 c4 c5 c6] term=c cfg=(v1 v2 w) committed=6 leader

# Release the witness now that v1 is caught up.
release v2
----
ok
vote:  (c, v2)
acked: (c6, released)

# New election: v1 campaigns. Both logs are identical, so v2 votes yes.
# Witness was released at c6, candidate log at c6 is up to date: yes.
campaign v1
----
v1 campaigns at term d
v1: yes (self)
v2: yes
w:  yes
outcome: won

# v1 proposes, then replicates to v2.
propose v1
----
v1: [a1 b2 c3 c4 c5 c6 d7 d8] term=d cfg=(v1 v2 w) leader
v2: [a1 b2 c3 c4 c5 c6] term=d cfg=(v1 v2 w)

append v1
----
v1 appends through d8
v2: ok
v1: [a1 b2 c3 c4 c5 c6 d7 d8] term=d cfg=(v1 v2 w) committed=8 leader
v2: [a1 b2 c3 c4 c5 c6 d7 d8] term=d cfg=(v1 v2 w)

# Engage the witness under the new leader.
engage v1
----
ok
vote:  (d, v1)
acked: (d8, engaged)
